case-shell.description: Investigate technical incidents within a virtual environment, explore files, use the terminal, and solve the case as if you were inside the system. We built something so great that we came in <highlight>🏆 4th place at the hackathon</highlight>

notidev.title: NotiDev
notidev.description: A platform to share daily news automatized with n8n

good-life-insurance.description: Good Life Insurance is a small company that provides insurance services.
good-life-insurance.problem: The company did not have a strong online presence, leading to the loss of potential customers, a slow and manual registration process, and a failure to provide information about the services it offers.
good-life-insurance.solution: Through a collaborative effort, we successfully developed a professional website that addressed existing issues and strengthened the brand with a strong online presence.
good-life-insurance.results:
- The company now has a professional website.

- The registration process is now automated.

- The company has gained +50% more customers after gaining exposure on social media.

- The company has expanded by +40% following this growth.
